assessment_items.question_content:
**The *Equestrian Sculpture of Marcus Aurelius* is one of many equestrian sculptures to survive from antiquity.**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c308ae935fedc899dc9c7f99c6609fb4.jpg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: **This is the only equestrian sculpture of this size to survive from antiquity, even though historical records point to many more being made.**

assessment_items.question_content:
**The *Equestrian Sculpture of Marcus Aurelius* reflects a sophisticated knowledge of both human anatomy and the anatomy of the horse.**


![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d191bd67d58972b234846c68dd4b068a.jpg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: **This is correct. The sculpture reflects a sophisticated knowledge of human and equine anatomy.**

assessment_items.question_content: **The *Equestrian Statue of Marcus Aurelius* influenced [[☃ dropdown 1]] artists, who revived the ancient tradition of equestrian sculpture and celebrated individual human achievements.**
hints: **The *Equestrian Statue of Marcus Aurelius* influenced Renaissance artists, who revived the ancient tradition of equestrian sculpture and celebrated individual human achievements.**
